# Effectime

> Effectime is a Hungarian-primary enterprise workforce management platform offering shift scheduling, capacity planning, leave management, and CRM embed SDK.

## About

Effectime is a web-based SaaS platform designed for Hungarian SMEs and enterprises to manage their workforce efficiently. It provides real-time team calendars, shift rosters, capacity planning, leave approval workflows, and embeddable workforce widgets for CRM systems.

- **Primary language**: Hungarian (also available in English, Czech, Slovak, Polish, German, Romanian)
- **Target market**: Hungary and Central Eastern Europe
- **Business model**: Freemium workspace with enterprise tier upgrade
- **Founded**: Budapest, Hungary

## Products and features

- **Műszakbeosztás (Shift Scheduling)**: Weekly shift assignment grid per office location with write permissions
- **Kapacitástervező (Capacity Planner)**: Daily capacity vs. staffing need tracking per team/office
- **Távollétek (Leave Management)**: Team leave calendar with configurable approval chains
- **Irodai létszám (Office Headcount)**: Daily headcount tracking across office locations
- **CRM Embed SDK**: Token-gated iframe embeds — bring workforce data into any CRM system
- **Microsoft 365 Integration**: Outlook calendar synchronization
- **Jóváhagyási lánc (Approval Chains)**: Multi-level leave and schedule approval workflows
- **Viszonteladói portál (Reseller Portal)**: Partner management for resellers

## Key facts

- Supports 8 languages: Hungarian, English, Czech, Slovak, Polish, German (AT), Romanian
- GDPR-compliant, EU data residency
- Free registration available at https://effectime.app/
- PWA installable on Android and iOS
- Multi-tenant workspace architecture

## Pricing

Free tier available. Enterprise tier available for larger teams requiring advanced integrations, approval workflows, and CRM embed SDK.

## Contact

Website: https://effectime.app/

## Use cases

- Managing shift schedules for 20–500 person teams
- Replacing Excel-based leave tracking with automated approval workflows
- Embedding workforce data into Salesforce, HubSpot, or custom CRM systems
- Capacity planning for hybrid office/remote teams
- Compliance with Hungarian labor law (Mt. törvény) leave entitlement rules
